```{=html}
<div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); gap: 10px; width: 100%; max-width: 100%;">    
  <style>
    .logo-cell {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: center;
      height: 110px;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .logo-cell img {
      max-width: 110px;
      max-height: 110px;
      object-fit: contain; 
    }
  </style>

  <div class="logo-cell"><img src="/images/logo/main infra/logo_ifb.png" alt="logo inrae" /></div>
  <div class="logo-cell"><img src="/images/logo/main infra/logo_inrae.png" alt="logo inrae" /></div>
  <div class="logo-cell"><img src="/images/logo/main infra/logo_oniris.png" alt="logo inrae" /></div>
  <div class="logo-cell"><img src="/images/logo/main infra/logo_IRBA.jpg" alt="logo inrae" /></div>
  <div class="logo-cell"><img src="/images/logo/main infra/logo_CEA.jpg" alt="logo inrae" /></div>
  <div class="logo-cell"><img src="/images/logo/main infra/logo_CNRS.png" alt="logo inrae" /></div>
  <div class="logo-cell"><img src="/images/logo/main infra/logo_Birmingham.png" alt="logo inrae" /></div>
  <div class="logo-cell"><img src="/images/logo/main infra/logo_Sorbonne.png" alt="logo inrae" /></div>
  <div class="logo-cell"><img src="/images/logo/main infra/logo_ULB.jpg" alt="logo inrae" /></div>
  <div class="logo-cell"><img src="/images/logo/main infra/logo_UClermontAuvergne.jpg" alt="logo inrae" /></div>
  <div class="logo-cell"><img src="/images/logo/main infra/logo_URouen.png" alt="logo inrae" /></div>
  <div class="logo-cell"><img src="/images/logo/main infra/logo_Muni.png" alt="logo inrae" /></div>
  
</div>
```
